blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles are present on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: No parts of the receipt/invoice are missing or incomplete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements are obstructing the document content.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.error_message: The document location (South Korea) does not match the expected location (Japan).
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that indicate it is an expense document. It includes the supplier (TADA), consumer recipient (서수빈), transaction amount (₩23,400), transaction date (Tue, May 13, 2025), item description/line items (taxi fare details), and payment method (MASTER 52101301** Personal). Although the location does not match the expected location, the document is classified as an expense under the 'travel' category.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, including evidence of payment completed, actual amounts charged/paid, and payment confirmation, thus meeting the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: Fares are calculated based on boarding time, meaning the time you boarded the vehicle to the time you got off. The fare is dynamically adjusted based on real-time analysis of request volume.

issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must show a unique identifier for the transaction.

issues.description: Tax registration number of the supplier is missing.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must show the tax registration number of the supplier.

issues.field: Exchange rate of main banks on the day of purchase
issues.description: Exchange rate of main banks on the day of purchase is missing.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: For overseas expenses, exchange rate of main banks on the day of purchase. If paid with cash in local currency, follow the rate printed on currency exchange transaction receipt. If paid with credit card, follow the rate printed on card statement

issues.description: For mileage reimbursements, include To and Fro locations, distance travelled and per diem rates.
issues.recommendation: Please provide To and Fro locations, distance travelled and per diem rates for mileage reimbursement.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: For mileage reimbursements, include To and Fro locations, distance travelled and per diem rates

issues.field: Additional documentation for foreign currency expenses
issues.description: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please convert the amount in local currency and include the currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing several mandatory fields including the receipt number, tax registration number, and exchange rate for foreign currency expenses. Additionally, more detailed information is required for mileage reimbursement and foreign currency expenses. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with GoGlobal's ICP requirements in Japan.
